---
title: "P1.01 — (placeholder — replace with Part 1, Problem 1 title)"
problem-id: 1
status: not-started
difficulty: 0
topics: []
date: "2026-05-18"
description: "Placeholder. Part 1 not yet started."
---

::: {.callout-warning appearance="simple"}
This problem hasn't been started yet. The dashboard tracks it as **not-started**.
:::

> Solution will appear here once drafting begins.

When ready, change the frontmatter `status:` to `draft`, then `revised`, then `final` as the solution matures.
